message:
feat(inference): add belief-state POMDP utilities (nao.16)

Implements belief-state update module for POMDP-style sequential decisions:
- ProcessState enum (Useful, UsefulBad, Abandoned, Zombie)
- BeliefState struct with log-domain numerical stability
- TransitionModel for state evolution P(S'|S)
- ObservationLikelihood for P(observation|state)
- update_belief() implementing the POMDP belief update equation
- update_belief_batch() for sequential updates
- belief_kl_divergence() and belief_js_divergence() for comparison
- Comprehensive test suite (26 tests)

Also exports read_environ from supervision module to fix test compilation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
